ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "amend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report has been amended */,
  "period_focus" TEXT /* Focus period of the report (e.g., Q1, Q2, FY) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., 10-Q, 10-K) */,
  "revenues" REAL /* Total revenues for the period */,
  "op_income" REAL /* Operating income for the period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the period */,
  "eps_basic" REAL /* Earnings per share (basic) for the period */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Earnings per share (diluted) for the period */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividends paid during the period */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets at the end of the period */,
  "cur_assets" REAL /* Current assets at the end of the period */,
  "cur_liab" REAL /* Current liabilities at the end of the period */,
  "cash" REAL /* Cash on hand at the end of the period */,
  "equity" REAL /* Shareholder equity at the end of the period */,
  "cash_flow_op" REAL /* Cash flow from operating activities for the period */,
  "cash_flow_inv" REAL /* Cash flow from investing activities for the period */,
  "cash_flow_fin" REAL /* Cash flow from financing activities for the period */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "approval_by" TEXT /* User who approved the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_fiscal_year FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("fiscal_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_doc_type FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_period_focus FOREIGN KEY ("period_focus") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_focus")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Latest annual revenue of the company */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal period */,
  "period_focus" TEXT /* Focus period of the report (e.g., Q1, Q2, FY) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fiscal period (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., 10-Q, 10-K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the document (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "required_fields" TEXT /* Required fields for the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the report */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (e.g., time spent viewing the report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
